status.defensepowerup.name: Defense Power Up
status.defensepowerdown.name: Defense Power Down
status.spellpowerup.name: Spell Power Up
status.spellpowerup.description: Spell cards effect power +{0} for this turn.
status.spellpowerdown.name: Spell Power Down
status.spellpowerdown.description: Spell cards effect power -{0} for this turn.
status.protection.name: Protection
status.protection.description: Reduce incoming physical damage by {0} for this turn.
status.fragile.name: Fragile
status.fragile.description: Increase incoming physical damage by {0} for this turn.
status.burn.name: Burn
status.burn.description: At the end of the turn, take {0} fixed damage, then halve this stack.
status.bleed.name: Bleed
status.bleed.description: When an attack is played, take {0} fixed damage, then halve this stack.
status.stunned.name: Stunned
status.stunned.description: All card slots become unavailable for {0} turns.
status.silenced.name: Silenced
status.silenced.description: The left-most available card slot becomes unavailable for this turn.
status.enchantment.name: Enchantment
status.enchantment.description:
A resource consumed or checked by certain effects. At the end of the turn, exhausts.
Max stack: 1.
status.speedup.name: Speed Up
status.speeddown.name: Speed Down
status.manaup.name: Mana Up
status.manaup.description: At the start of the turn, add {0} MP, then exhausts.
status.manadown.name: Mana Down
status.manadown.description: At the start of the turn, remove {0} MP, then exhausts.
status.relentless.name: Relentless
status.relentless.description: At the start of the turn, gain 1 Attack Power Up and 1 Defense Power Up.
status.hardened.name: Hardened
status.hardened.description: Whenever this unit takes damage for the first time each turn, gain 1 Defense Power Up.
status.swift.name: Swift
status.swift.description: At the start of the turn, gain 1 Speed Up.
